_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Hearing loss caused by stapes fixation as a result of otosclerosis, tympanosclerosis, or congenital malformation
Conductive hearing loss (due to stapes footplate fixation) with an air bone gap of at least 30dB

preauth.label: Clinical notes (detailing signs, symptoms, ear examination findings, indications for doing the procedure& advise for admission)
Audiometry report confirming conductive deafness and Tympanometry

claim.label: Intra-operative photograph with time and date (optional)
Invoice of the ossicular prosthesis/ piston used, if any

ppd_preauth.q: Detailed Clinical notes (including clinical symptoms, ear examination findings, indications for doing the procedure & advice for admission)?
Evidence of Audiometry confirming conductive deafness?
Does the patient complain of functional hearing loss?

cpd_claim.q: Do OT notes detail the steps of surgery performed and outcomes of the surgery?
Are the documents available to show appropriate post-op care, advice including for follow-up?

common_queries: Clinical notes, ear examination findings, or admission advice missing/incomplete at pre-authorization
Audiometry report not confirming conductive deafness or Tympanometry missing/incomplete at pre-authorization
Air bone gap is less than 30dB despite stapes footplate fixation
Patient does not complain of functional hearing loss
Operative notes missing or not detailing surgical steps and outcomes at claim submission
Documents showing appropriate post-operative care and follow-up advice are missing

clinical_key_pointers: Proceed for surgery only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical signs, symptoms, and ear examination.
additional_information.post_op_care: Outcome: Air-bone gap is improved to <20dB.
